focus: Runtime formatter and eval handler alignment for command presentation gaps

evidenceSummary.summary: Runtime formatter builds the /memory:search data.envelopeRender fragment from requestQuality and citationPolicy, so the envelope slot is runtime-backed rather than presentation-only.
A stale runtime-adjacent formatter comment still says the envelope fragment is gated dark and off by default, conflicting with the current default-ON command contract.

Ablation formatted output includes corpus diagnostic lanes when corpus metrics are present, while the reporting-dashboard text formatter renders summary/metrics/channels/trends without an analogous diagnostic lane section.
Code README coverage is mixed: eval README documents diagnostic snapshots and corpus metrics, while search README omits the formatter-owned envelope-render surface from its key-file map.
